g.text: Cold Start: The Data Plane Bypasses the Metadata Server

text.style: opacity: 1; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; fill: rgb(118, 118, 118); fill-opacity: 1; font-weight: 300; white-space: pre;
